Terms & Conditions

For Silara Enterprises

Business Details

Silara Enterprises is a registered business based in Kolkata, India, GSTIN: 19CTHPM0710P1ZC

Orders & Payments

All orders are subject to availability. For international bulk orders (B2B), separate commercial invoices and export terms apply.

Shipping & Delivery

We provide end-to-end delivery tracking via WhatsApp. Delivery timelines are estimates and may vary based on customs and courier schedules.

Refunds & Returns

Due to the perishable nature of food products, returns are only accepted for damage reported within 48 hours of delivery.

Limitation of Liability

Silara Enterprises is not liable for delays caused by third-party logistics or customs clearance in international markets.

Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of West Bengal, India.

Silara SuperFoods is a trademark of Silara Enterprises and unauthorized use is prohibited by law. Reach us at contact@silara.org for any feedback or inquiries.
